heroHeadline: Orthodox Easter Ceasefire Now Active — First Halt in Hostilities Since Talks Accelerated
heroSubtitle: The Russia-Ukraine Easter truce moves from announcement to active implementation, marking the first agreed bilateral pause in the full-scale invasion; Ukrainian officials remain cautiously skeptical
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
